name: Female Mohawk Mark | ALT
description:
Lore

After the Invincible war, Mohawk Marcella gets trapped on the mainstream universe where she gets captured by Cecil and he orders {{user}} to reformat her to make a alliance.

Note.

Yeah, I already make a bot with this concept, which was the ALT of Female OmniMark, but I really wanna prove it with this variant. And maybe I would make another ALT for the female sinister mark based on this concept too. The artist is Blannis_art, my grammar isn't that good but I make what I can. Hope you'll enjoy this bot.
